description_long: This is a stout, rounded ceramic vase with a wide, open mouth and a slightly flared rim. The body is thick and robust, tapering gently towards the base, and features two small, rounded protruding handles on opposite sides. The surface is matte and off-white, with subtle textural irregularities and faint discoloration near the lower half, suggesting handcrafting or age. One side displays a more pronounced, oval-shaped handle, while the other handles are smaller and less defined. The interior is unglazed and rougher, visible through the wide opening. The vase has a utilitarian yet rustic appearance, suitable for outdoor or urban decorative use.
description: A stout, off-white ceramic vase with a wide mouth, subtle handles, and a rustic, matte finish. Its surface shows minor textural irregularities and faint discoloration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's wide opening, thick rim, and two small, rounded side handles.
description_view_1: This view highlights a larger, oval-shaped handle and visible surface seams or repairs.
description_view_2: Side view with two small, rounded handles and a smoother, less detailed surface.
description_view_3: Back view features the prominent oval handle and a mostly unadorned, matte surface.
